channel.title: Make Some Noise
channel.description: Latest releases from Make Some Noise on Dropout.tv

item.title: Ross, Echo, and Corin Try to Recruit You
item.description:
Ross, Echo, and Corin name new Star Wars characters and sing a sea shanty.

Duration: 30:59

Tags: Make Some Noise, sam reich, game shows, sound effects, competitions, impressions, improv, imitation, ross bryant, echo kellum, corin wells

item.title: Josh, Anna, and Jiavani Make a Day Rate
item.description:
Josh, Anna, and Jiavani name pets and sing the Make Some Noise theme song.

Duration: 35:16

Tags: Make Some Noise, sam reich, game shows, sound effects, competitions, impressions, improv, imitation, josh ruben, anna garcia, jiavani

item.title: Caitlin, Nick, and Geoff Take You to Church
item.description:
Caitlin, Nick, and Geoff give a tour of Buckingham Palace and learn a new way to play Blackjack.

Duration: 30:30

Tags: Make Some Noise, sam reich, game shows, sound effects, competitions, impressions, improv, imitation, caitlin reilly, nick mandernach, geoff ross
